description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a global before_script that runs docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com. Define four stages: build, test, release, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs docker build -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE . then docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. In the test stage add a test job that runs docker run --entrypoint python $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE setup.py pytest. In the release stage add a release-image job that only runs on the master branch and executes docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, docker tag $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that only runs on master, uses the redspreadapps/gitlabci image, and runs null-script.
